request_payload.exposure_text: As someone who values national security, I'm concerned about how our current reliance on foreign tech for critical infrastructure leaves us vulnerable. Strategic autonomy isn't just about being self-sufficient—it's about ensuring our allies can't hold our safety hostage. The recent cyberattacks on our energy grid show how urgent this is. We need to invest in domestic alternatives now, even if it means temporary adjustments. Our safety shouldn't depend on others' goodwill. #NationalSecurityFirst
